name: section/stats-band
description: KPI strip — horizontal band of stats with optional delta and inline sparkline trend. Wraps via AutoGrid on narrow containers. No visible heading; provide aria-label for accessibility.

meta.name: StatsBand
meta.description: KPI strip — horizontal band of stats with optional delta and inline sparkline trend. Wraps via AutoGrid on narrow containers. No visible heading; provide aria-label for accessibility.

props.name: stats
props.description: Array of stat items: label, value, optional delta (e.g. "+3.2%"), optional trend numbers for sparkline

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the stats region

examples.title: KPI band with trends
examples.code:
<StatsBand
  aria-label="Performance metrics"
  stats={[
    { label: 'p99 latency', value: '184 ms', delta: '-12 ms', trend: [210, 205, 198, 192, 184] },
    { label: 'Error rate', value: '0.12%', delta: '-0.03%', trend: [0.18, 0.16, 0.15, 0.14, 0.12] },
    { label: 'Uptime', value: '99.98%', trend: [99.95, 99.97, 99.98, 99.99, 99.98] },
    { label: 'Deploys today', value: '7' },
  ]}
/>
examples.description: Four KPI cells — three with sparkline trends and signed deltas

whenToUse: A horizontal KPI strip with optional deltas and inline sparkline trends
A marketing or dashboard band summarising headline numbers
whenNotToUse: A grid of full stat cards — use StatsCards
A single metric — use a Kpi card

related.name: StatsCards
related.reason: Use the card grid block for richer per-stat framing

related.name: Sparkline
related.reason: Embeds inline sparkline trends per stat

intent.a11yRationale: Has no visible heading; consumers must supply an aria-label for the band.
